prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低位次分别为6621→7567→7700→8294→9327，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约2706名；2025年基准位次约9327名，较2024年后移1033名，后移幅度明显扩大；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为149人，2024年扩至161人，2025年扩至171人；2026年计划185人，较2025年增加14人（+8.2%），连续第三年扩招，但扩招幅度小于考生增幅。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第84名，近年排名在75–84之间小幅波动，整体处于中上游211水平；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情事件；抖音平台曝光度一般，未进入热度排名前100；无投档线断档或暴跌记录，报考心理预期稳定；第五轮学科评估中，电气工程获评A，动力工程及工程热物理获评A-，均为该校核心王牌学科，在全国电力行业具有显著影响力，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业2024年社会热度评级为"高热推荐"，较2023年明显升温；能源动力类专业评级为"推荐"（66.43），相关专业报考热度持续走高。北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约19466人（+29.7%），考生规模大幅增长，竞争压力显著加剧；该校校本部位于北京市，属于本地高校，在京招生计划连续三年扩招（149→161→171→185），本地考生报考意愿通常较高；2025年在北京招生171人，占比较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+8.2%）、北京市考生总数大幅增长（+29.7%）、核心王牌专业（电气工程A）社会热度持续升温等因素，竞争加剧是主要方向。在2025年基准9327名基础上，预测2026年最低位次约9985名，区间9485–10485名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约9985名，区间9485–10485名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主攻方向（自动化、能源与动力工程、计算机科学与技术等），一档王牌专业（电气工程及其自动化、智能电网信息工程）作为冲刺目标；位次明显优于区间下限（<9485）可重点冲击一档电气类专业；位次接近区间上限（>10485）建议以三档中偏工科专业（软件工程、新能源、核工程等）为主，兼顾保底。该校电气工程A学科全国领先，电力行业就业优势突出，是报考核心亮点。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Beijing comprehensive category were 6621→7567→7700→8294→9327, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2706 places in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 9327, a backward shift of 1033 places compared to 2024, with a significantly enlarged backward amplitude; the university's enrollment plan for Beijing comprehensive category was 149 from 2021 to 2023, expanded to 161 in 2024, and to 171 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 185, an increase of 14 (+8.2%) compared to 2025, the third consecutive year of expansion, but the expansion rate is smaller than the increase in candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 84th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with slight fluctuations between 75 and 84 in recent years, overall at the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion incidents; exposure on Douyin platform is average, not in the top 100 popularity rankings; no record of cutoff line gaps or sharp drops, stable psychological expectations for applicants; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Electrical Engineering was rated A, and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics was rated A-, both core ace disciplines of the university, with significant influence in the national power industry, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major had a social popularity rating of 'highly recommended' in 2024, significantly warming up compared to 2023; the Energy and Power major was rated 'recommended' (66.43), with related majors' application popularity continuing to rise. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Beijing college entrance examination is about 84,900, an increase of about 19,466 (+29.7%) compared to 65,434 in 2025, with a substantial growth in candidate scale and significantly intensified competition pressure; the university's main campus is located in Beijing, a local university, with enrollment plans in Beijing expanding for three consecutive years (149→161→171→185), and local candidates generally have a high willingness to apply; in 2025, it enrolled 171 students in Beijing, accounting for a large proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+8.2%), the substantial increase in the total number of candidates in Beijing (+29.7%), and the rising social popularity of core ace majors (Electrical Engineering A), intensified competition is the main direction. Based on the 2025 baseline of 9327, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 9985, with a range of 9485–10485.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 9985, with a range of 9485–10485. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Energy and Power Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, etc.) as the main direction, with Tier 1 ace majors (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Smart Grid Information Engineering) as sprint targets; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<9485), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 electrical majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>10485), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 engineering-oriented majors (Software Engineering, New Energy, Nuclear Engineering, etc.) while considering safety options. The university's Electrical Engineering A discipline is nationally leading, with outstanding employment advantages in the power industry, making it a core highlight for applications.
